name: mcp-apps-builder
tagline: Navigation-style best-practices guide for building MCP servers (tools, resources, prompts, widgets, auth) with mcp-use.
verdict: Well-organized router into ~20 reference files, concrete examples, and built-in rerun safety (detects existing projects before scaffolding). Weak spots: claims 'MANDATORY for ALL MCP server work' with no stated exclusions, unpinned npx scaffold command, and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: `npx create-mcp-use-app my-server` scaffolds with no version pin on the installer package.
No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance despite claiming to be MANDATORY for ALL MCP server work.
Project-type ambiguity is handled via a decision tree, but scaffold/npm failures during `npx create-mcp-use-app` are never addressed.
